title: ArGuard 2026 — Subtask A1 (Binary Hateful Meme Detection)
description: Arabic multimodal hateful-meme classification. Given a meme (image plus OCR-extracted Arabic text), predict whether it is Hateful or Not Hateful. Official metric: macro-F1.
description_zh: 阿拉伯语多模态仇恨表情包分类。给定一个表情包（图像加上OCR提取的阿拉伯语文本），预测它是否为仇恨或非仇恨。官方指标：宏F1。

pages.title: Participation
pages.content:
# How to participate

ArGuard 2026 — Task 1 / Track A · **Subtask A1: Binary Hateful Meme Detection**.

## Who can join
You can take part as an individual or as a team. A person can participate in multiple shared tasks within ArGuard 2026 — see the full list at the [task website](https://araieval.gitlab.io/ArGuard2026/).

## How to register
1. Sign up on this CodaBench competition page.
2. Read the [Terms](#) tab — pay particular attention to the submission file format and naming convention.
3. Download the data from the Hugging Face Hub: [`QCRI/ArGuard-Task1`](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ArGuard-Task1).
4. Clone the starter kit: [`araieval/ArGuard-2026-tasks`](https://github.com/araieval/ArGuard-2026-tasks).
5. Train your model and generate predictions on the `dev_test` split during the development phase, and on the `test` split during the final-evaluation phase.

## Submitting
- One team member submits per phase via the **Submit** tab.
- Upload your TSV prediction file as `prediction.zip` (see Terms).
- The latest valid submission before the deadline counts as your team's final submission for that phase.

## System description paper
All teams are encouraged to submit a system-description paper for the workshop. A single paper may cover multiple subtasks if you participated in more than one.

## Contact
Questions: arguard2026-organizers@googlegroups.com
pages.content_zh:
# 如何参与

ArGuard 2026 — 任务1 / A赛道 · **子任务A1：仇恨表情包二分类检测**

## 谁可以参加
您可以以个人或团队身份参加。一个人可以参加ArGuard 2026内的多个共享任务 — 查看[任务网站](https://araieval.gitlab.io/ArGuard2026/)获取完整列表。

## 如何注册
1. 在此CodaBench竞赛页面上注册。
2. 阅读[条款](#)标签 — 特别注意提交文件格式和命名规范。
3. 从Hugging Face Hub下载数据：[`QCRI/ArGuard-Task1`](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ArGuard-Task1)。
4. 克隆初始工具包：[`araieval/ArGuard-2026-tasks`](https://github.com/araieval/ArGuard-2026-tasks)。
5. 训练您的模型，在开发阶段生成`dev_test`分割上的预测，在最终评估阶段生成`test`分割上的预测。

## 提交
- 每个阶段由一名团队成员通过**提交**标签进行提交。
- 将您的TSV预测文件作为`prediction.zip`上传（见条款）。
- 截止时间前的最新有效提交将被视为您团队在该阶段的最终提交。

## 系统描述论文
所有团队都可以为研讨会提交系统描述论文。如果您参加了多个子任务，一篇论文可以涵盖多个子任务。

## 联系方式
问题咨询：arguard2026-organizers@googlegroups.com

pages.title: Dataset
pages.content:
# Dataset

ArGuard Task 1 — Track A is built around an Arabic multimodal meme dataset: each instance is an image with overlaid Arabic text (OCR-extracted). Memes are manually annotated for hatefulness.

For **Subtask A1**, every meme has a single binary label from {`Hateful`, `Not Hateful`}.

## Get the data
The official splits live on the Hugging Face Hub at [`QCRI/ArGuard-Task1`](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ArGuard-Task1). Download them with the helper script from the starter kit:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/araieval/ArGuard-2026-tasks.git
cd ArGuard-2026-tasks/task1
pip install -r requirements.txt
python data/download_data.py
```

## Splits

| Split        | Records | Labels   | Phase                    | Purpose                                    |
|--------------|--------:|----------|--------------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| `train`      |   3,500 | full     | development              | model training                             |
| `dev`        |     500 | full     | development              | hyperparameter selection, local evaluation |
| `dev_test`   |     500 | **none** | development (leaderboard)| submission target for the dev-phase leaderboard |
| `test`       |     500 | full     | final evaluation         | blind ranking (triple-annotated gold)      |

The `dev_test` split is released with labels stripped — that is the file you submit predictions for during the development phase.

## Record schema (after `download_data.py`)
```json
{
    "id": "f9a8…b1.jpg",
    "image_path": "img/f9a8…b1.jpg",
    "text": "OCR-extracted Arabic text…",
    "label": "Hateful" | "Not Hateful" | null,
    "fine_grained_label": ["Mocking", "Incitement"],
    "annotations": []
}
```

## Licence
The dataset is released under **CC BY-NC 4.0** (non-commercial research use only).

## Resources
- Starter kit: <https://github.com/araieval/ArGuard-2026-tasks>
- Task website: <https://araieval.gitlab.io/ArGuard2026/>
pages.content_zh:
# 数据集

ArGuard 第1任务 — A赛道基于阿拉伯语多模态表情包数据集构建：每个实例包含一张图像和覆盖在其上的阿拉伯文本（通过OCR提取）。表情包已手动标注仇恨程度。

对于**子任务A1**，每个表情包都有一个来自{`Hateful`（仇恨）、`Not Hateful`（非仇恨）}的二分类标签。

## 获取数据
官方数据集存放在Hugging Face Hub的[`QCRI/ArGuard-Task1`](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ArGuard-Task1)。使用初始工具包中的辅助脚本下载：

```bash
git clone https://github.com/araieval/ArGuard-2026-tasks.git
cd ArGuard-2026-tasks/task1
pip install -r requirements.txt
python data/download_data.py
```

## 数据划分

| 划分        | 记录数 | 标签   | 阶段                    | 用途                                    |
|--------------|--------:|----------|--------------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| `train`      |   3,500 | 完整     | 开发阶段              | 模型训练                             |
| `dev`        |     500 | 完整     | 开发阶段              | 超参数选择、本地评估 |
| `dev_test`   |     500 | **无** | 开发阶段（排行榜）| 开发阶段排行榜提交目标 |
| `test`       |     500 | 完整     | 最终评估         | 盲目排名（三重标注黄金标准）      |

`dev_test`划分发布时已移除标签——这是开发阶段进行预测提交的文件。

## 记录模式（`download_data.py`之后）
```json
{
    "id": "f9a8…b1.jpg",
    "image_path": "img/f9a8…b1.jpg",
    "text": "OCR提取的阿拉伯文本…",
    "label": "Hateful" | "Not Hateful" | null,
    "fine_grained_label": ["Mocking", "Incitement"],
    "annotations": []
}
```

## 许可证
数据集发布于**CC BY-NC 4.0**许可证（仅限非商业研究使用）。

## 资源
- 初始工具包：<https://github.com/araieval/ArGuard-2026-tasks>
- 任务网站：<https://araieval.gitlab.io/ArGuard2026/>

pages.title: Timeline
pages.content:
# Timeline

## Development phase
Use this phase to tune your models on `train.jsonl` / `dev.jsonl` and submit predictions on `dev_test.jsonl` for the leaderboard.

**Window:** `2026-05-14 → 2026-07-19`
**Submissions:** up to 5 per day, 100 total.

## Testing phase
The final blind test split is released. Train on `train.jsonl` + `dev.jsonl`, submit predictions on `test.jsonl` — your best valid submission counts toward the official ranking.

**Window:** `2026-07-20 → 2026-07-29`
**Submissions:** up to 20 per day, 100 total.

> Adjust the dates inside `competition.yaml` (the `phases.start` / `phases.end` fields) if your task schedule shifts.

## Workshop
Paper submissions and notification dates will be announced on the [task website](https://araieval.gitlab.io/ArGuard2026/).
pages.content_zh:
# 时间表

## 开发阶段
使用此阶段在 `train.jsonl` / `dev.jsonl` 上调整模型，并在 `dev_test.jsonl` 上提交预测以获得排行榜成绩。

**时间窗口：** `2026-05-14 → 2026-07-19`
**提交次数：** 每天最多5次，总计100次。

## 测试阶段
发布最终的盲测集。在 `train.jsonl` + `dev.jsonl` 上训练，在 `test.jsonl` 上提交预测——你的最佳有效提交将计入官方排名。

**时间窗口：** `2026-07-20 → 2026-07-29`
**提交次数：** 每天最多20次，总计100次。

> 如果任务计划发生变化，请调整 `competition.yaml` 中的日期（`phases.start` / `phases.end` 字段）。

## 研讨会
论文提交和通知日期将在[任务网站](https://araieval.gitlab.io/ArGuard2026/)上公布。
